name: Replicate
description: Replicate provides cloud infrastructure for running open-source AI models. Create predictions using any model, manage deployments, upload files, search models, run training jobs, and manage model versions through a comprehensive REST API.

capabilities.name: prediction_create
capabilities.description: Create a prediction by running a model with specified inputs. Supports webhooks and async polling.

capabilities.name: predictions_list
capabilities.description: List all predictions with optional filtering by date and source.

capabilities.name: prediction_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the current state and output of a specific prediction.

capabilities.name: prediction_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel a running prediction.

capabilities.name: models_list
capabilities.description: List public models with sorting options.

capabilities.name: model_get
capabilities.description: Get details about a specific model including its latest version and schema.

capabilities.name: model_create
capabilities.description: Create a new model on Replicate.

capabilities.name: model_prediction_create
capabilities.description: Create a prediction using an official model's latest version directly.

capabilities.name: model_versions_list
capabilities.description: List all versions of a specific model.

capabilities.name: models_search
capabilities.description: Search for models by text query.

capabilities.name: deployments_list
capabilities.description: List all deployments for your user or organization.

capabilities.name: deployment_create
capabilities.description: Create a new deployment with a specific model version and hardware.

capabilities.name: deployment_get
capabilities.description: Get details about a specific deployment.

capabilities.name: deployment_prediction_create
capabilities.description: Create a prediction using a deployment.

capabilities.name: deployment_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a deployment.

capabilities.name: collections_list
capabilities.description: List curated collections of models.

capabilities.name: collection_get
capabilities.description: Get a specific collection of models by slug.

capabilities.name: files_list
capabilities.description: List all uploaded files.

capabilities.name: file_create
capabilities.description: Upload a file for use with predictions.

capabilities.name: file_get
capabilities.description: Get details about an uploaded file.

capabilities.name: file_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an uploaded file.

capabilities.name: trainings_list
capabilities.description: List all training jobs.

capabilities.name: training_create
capabilities.description: Start a training job for a model version.

capabilities.name: training_get
capabilities.description: Get the status of a training job.

capabilities.name: training_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel a running training job.

capabilities.name: hardware_list
capabilities.description: List available hardware SKUs for running models.

capabilities.name: account_get
capabilities.description: Get the authenticated account details.

capabilities.name: webhook_secret_get
capabilities.description: Get the signing secret for the default webhook.
